applicability_notes: fusion_notes: Binary elementwise compute op: out = input_a * 2**input_b. Replaces the contiguous torch subsequence torch.ldexp(a, b) (equivalently a * torch.exp2(b)) with a single fused ttnn binary kernel. Both inputs must be TILE_LAYOUT on device; fp32 verified in tests (use_legacy=None path).

placement_observations.source: test: ttnn.from_torch(x_torch, dtype=ttnn.float32, layout=ttnn.TILE_LAYOUT, device=device) — default interleaved DRAM, no explicit memory_config
test: ttnn.from_torch(y_torch, dtype=ttnn.float32, layout=ttnn.TILE_LAYOUT, device=device) — default interleaved DRAM, no explicit memory_config
